title: Platinum
description: Replaces copper with platinum and changes designs of certain items, weapons, and armor
body:
Replaces copper with platinum and changes the designs of certain items, weapons and armor
-Netherite weapons and tools changed to look blood themed
-Diamond weapons and tools changed to look like legendary weapons/tools
-Gold weapons and tools made darker and given red handles
-Iron weapons and tools changed to be fantasy demonic weapons/tools

Netherite armor and ingot are now more purple(armor has red accents)
Diamond armor and ingot are now more pale blue(armor has gold accents)
Gold armor and ingot are now darker
Iron armor and ingot are now slightly purple with deep purple accents

All copper items and objects are now platinum, a metal that looks like a bluish-silver
